zh.Kilmainham, County Meath, Ireland: 愛爾蘭庫迪 米亞斯吉爾曼哈姆
zh.Woodbridge, Suffolk, England: 英國素福爾可伍德布里奇
zh.lifeSummary: 當Ralph de Ufford於1302年出生在英國素福爾可武福德時，他的父親Robert de Ufford II23歲，母親Cecily de Valoignes21歲。他與Eve De Clavering結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他在愛爾蘭被列為supreme court justice。他去世於1346年在愛爾蘭庫迪 米亞斯吉爾曼哈姆享年44歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可。

zh-hans.Kilmainham, County Meath, Ireland: 爱尔兰庫迪 米亞斯吉爾曼哈姆
zh-hans.Woodbridge, Suffolk, England: 英国素福爾可伍德布里奇
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ralph de Ufford于1302年出生在英国素福爾可武福德时，他的父亲Robert de Ufford II23岁，母亲Cecily de Valoignes21岁。他与Eve De Clavering结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他在爱尔兰被列为supreme court justice。他去世于1346年在爱尔兰庫迪 米亞斯吉爾曼哈姆享年44岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素福爾可。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ufford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Ufford (Northamptonshire), Ufford (Suffolk), or Offord Cluny or Offord Darcy (Huntingdonshire). The Northamptonshire and Suffolk placenames derive from the Old English personal name Uffa + Old English worth ‘enclosure’. For the Huntingdonshire placename see Offord , with which the surname may have been confused.

variants.name: Offord
meanings: English (East Anglia and London): habitational name from Offord Cluny and Offord Darcy in Huntindgonshire. The placename derives from Old English upp ‘up, upper’ + ford ‘ford’.
English: alternatively, from a lost place called Offord near Pennyford in Wootton Wawen, Warwickshire. The placename derives from the Old English personal name Offa + Old English worth ‘enclosure’.

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Ralph de Ufford was born in 1302, in Ufford, Suffolk, England, his father, Robert de Ufford II, was 23 and his mother, Cecily de Valoignes, was 21. He married Eve De Clavering. They were the parents of at least 1 son. His occupation is listed as supreme court justice in Ireland. He died in 1346, in Kilmainham, County Meath, Ireland, at the age of 44, and was buried in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ralph de Ufford est né en 1302, à Ufford, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Ufford II, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Cecily de Valoignes, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Eve De Clavering. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Sa profession de son indiquée est supreme court justice à Irlande. Il est décédé en 1346, à Kilmainham, County Meath, Irlande, à l’âge de 44 ans, et a été enterré à Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ralph de Ufford 1302 in Ufford, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de Ufford II 23 und seine Mutter Cecily de Valoignes 21. Er hat Eve De Clavering geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. sein Beruf ist als supreme court justice in Irland aufgeführt. Er starb 1346 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Kilmainham, County Meath, Irland und wurde in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph de Ufford è nato il nel 1302 nel Ufford, Suffolk, England, il suo padre, Robert de Ufford II, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Cecily de Valoignes, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Eve De Clavering. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. La sua occupazione è indicata come supreme court justice nel Irlanda. Morì nel 1346, nel Kilmainham, County Meath, Irlanda, all'età di 44 anni, e fu sepolto a Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.Kilmainham, County Meath, Ireland: アイルランドコウントイ メアスキルメインハム
ja.Woodbridge, Suffolk, England: イギリススフォルクウッドブリッジ
ja.Ufford, Suffolk, England: イギリススフォルクウフォード
ja.Priory, Campsey, Suffolk, England: イギリスイギリススフォルク
ja.Thurston, Suffolk, England: イギリススフォルクスウルストン
ja.lifeSummary: Ralph de Uffordが1302年にイギリススフォルクウフォードで生まれた時，父Robert de Ufford IIは23歳，母Cecily de Valoignesは21歳であった。Eve De Claveringと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。アイルランドでの職業はsupreme court justiceと記録されている。彼は1346年にアイルランドコウントイ メアスキルメインハムで44歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ralph de Ufford(이)가 1302년 영국 수폴크 퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Ufford II(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Cecily de Valoignes(은)는 21세였다. 그는 Eve De Clavering(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그의 직업은 아일랜드에서 supreme court justice이었다. 그는 1346년 아일랜드 카운티 미스 킬맹함에서 44세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph de Ufford nasceu em 1302, em Ufford, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Ufford II, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Cecily de Valoignes, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Eve De Clavering. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Sua profissão aparece como supreme court justice em Irlanda. Ele faleceu em 1346, em Kilmainham, County Meath, Irlanda, com 44 anos, e foi sepultado em Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ralph de Ufford родился в 1302 г. в местности уффорд, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert de Ufford II было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Cecily de Valoignes, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Eve De Clavering. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын.  Он работал по профессии supreme court justice в местности Ирландия. Он умер в 1346 г. в местности килмеинам, коунти мит, Ирландия в возрасте 44 лет и был похоронен в местности суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ralph de Ufford nació en 1302, en Ufford, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert de Ufford II, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Cecily de Valoignes, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Eve De Clavering. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Su ocupación registrada era supreme court justice en Irlanda. Murió en 1346, en Kilmainham, County Meath, Irlanda, a la edad de 44 años, y fue sepultado en Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
